entities.name: WEST AFRICA SAHEL
entities.description: A semi-arid region in West Africa facing land degradation and water scarcity

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A country in the West Africa Sahel region

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in the West Africa Sahel region

entities.name: LAND RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of restoring the fertility and productivity of degraded lands

entities.name: WATER CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Limitations in water availability that restrict agricultural productivity

entities.name: SOIL POVERTY
entities.description: The inherent lack of essential nutrients in the soil

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity per unit area

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals used for food, fodder, and energy

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Farming practices including crop production and livestock management

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth

entities.name: FALLOW PERIOD
entities.description: The practice of leaving land uncultivated for a period to recover fertility

entities.name: BUSHFALLOW SYSTEM
entities.description: A traditional agricultural system involving rotating cultivation and fallow periods

entities.name: POPULATION PRESSURE
entities.description: Increased demand for land and resources due to population growth

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY DECLINE
entities.description: The gradual loss of soil nutrients over time

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC FACTORS
entities.description: Financial and social conditions affecting farmers' ability to invest in land

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The reduction of land productivity due to biophysical or human factors

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The removal of topsoil by physical agents

entities.name: WIND EROSION
entities.description: The removal of soil particles by wind

entities.name: WATER EROSION
entities.description: The removal of soil particles by water

entities.name: SOIL SALINIZATION
entities.description: The accumulation of soluble salts in the soil

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: The saturation of soil with water, impeding aeration

entities.name: CHEMICAL DETERIORATION
entities.description: The degradation of soil quality through chemical changes

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources to meet demand

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient and nutritious food

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of fertile land becoming desert, often due to land abuse and drought

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of deficient rainfall

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Integrated systems combining crops and trees for sustainable resource management

entities.name: REGENERATING DEGRADED LANDSCAPES
entities.description: The process of restoring productivity to degraded landscapes
